title: Effect Sounds│效果音效
description: Special sound effects will be produced when the effect is obtained.│當獲得狀態效果時會播放特殊音效。
body:
# Function│功能
When a mob gains an effect, a sound will play, making it easier to notice that the mob has gained the effect.│當生物獲得效果時，會播放音效，讓獲得效果這件事情更容易被注意到。

Almost all vanilla effects have sounds when gained, except Instant Health, Instant Damage, Bad Omen, Trial Omen, Raid Omen.│除瞬間治療、瞬間傷害、不祥之兆、試煉之兆、突襲之兆之外，幾乎所有原版效果在獲得時都會有聲音。
